title: Banana Baking
description: A mod that adds banana-themed baked goods.
body:
# Banana Baking

Banana baking introduces new foods, crops, and even a way to bake into Minecraft. Banana Baking was the first mod I made; however, it was made in Forge, and now I have decided to port it to Fabric and continue supporting it through Fabric.

I have added a way to view the mod's recipes in REI to make things easier. As a note, the banana crop has to be planted on the underside of leaves, and the baking oven needs a soul/normal campfire, soul/normal fire, lava block, or a lava cauldron underneath it as a fuel source to function.
